description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Test and lint that runs on every push and pull request. The workflow has two jobs: tests and linting. The tests job runs on multiple Python versions (3.6 to 3.11-dev) on an ubuntu-latest environment, checks out the repository, sets up Python, and runs unit tests. The linting job runs on ubuntu-latest, checks out the repository, sets up Python 3, installs dependencies, and lints the implementation and tests using flake8.
